section_13.title: Section 13: Structure of the One-Stop Output Document
section_13.description: Comprehensive glossary of all metrics, tier definitions, and thresholds used in Sections 1-12

heat_pump_readiness_tiers.tier_1: Ready now - Properties that can install heat pump immediately without fabric upgrades
heat_pump_readiness_tiers.tier_2: Minor work - Properties requiring minor fabric improvements (e.g., loft top-up)
heat_pump_readiness_tiers.tier_3: Major work - Properties requiring major fabric work (e.g., wall insulation)
heat_pump_readiness_tiers.tier_4: Challenging - Properties with multiple fabric issues requiring substantial investment
heat_pump_readiness_tiers.tier_5: Not suitable - Properties not suitable for heat pump without extensive retrofit

heat_network_spatial_tiers.tier_2: Within planned heat network zone (HNZ boundary)
